activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor verification via explicit mention anywhere in invoice
Goods description verification via article number first
Allowed summation of line weights when no total row in invoice
EU origin normalization and acceptance of EU member states

consignor.certificate_value:
Th.Brunius & Co AB
PO Box 2516
SE-403 17, Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Th. Brunius & Co AB
PO Box 2516
SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' in the certificate matches exactly the invoice issuer name 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' after normalization of legal form abbreviation and spacing. The consignor name is explicitly present in the invoice header and address block in all invoice pages (rule 4.1.0). The country 'Sweden' also matches exactly. No contradictions found.

Corrugated Carton
P.O.Box 51
11351 Riyadh
Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value:
Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton
P.O.Box 51
11351 Riyadh
Saudi Arabia
consignee.motivation: Consignee in the certificate matches the invoice consignee and sold-to parties exactly after normalization. The invoice contains explicit 'SOLD TO' and 'CONSIGNED TO' fields with matching name and address to the certificate consignee. Country 'Saudi Arabia' matches exactly.

goods_description.certificate_value:
82 reels of White Top Testliner
H.S. Code No.: 48052400
goods_description.invoice_value:
13 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
9 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
3 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
8 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
25 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
24 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
H.S. Code No.: 48052400
goods_description.motivation: The certificate goods description ('82 reels of White Top Testliner' with HS code 48052400) corresponds with multiple invoice item lines summing to 82 reels of 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' with the same HS code, all normalized. No semantic interpretation beyond normalization was needed. The invoice confirms the goods description explicitly.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in the certificate is 247.133 MT which exactly matches the Total Weight Quantity in the invoice (247.133 MT). Units are consistent and numeric value matches precisely without needing further normalization. No conflicting quantities found.

origin.invoice_value:
COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Slovakia
Made in Slovakia
We hereby certify that ... goods are of Slovakian origin.
origin.motivation: Country of origin 'Slovakia' as stated in the certificate is explicitly indicated as 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Slovakia' and 'Made in Slovakia' in the invoice, confirming explicit origin field match. No conflicting origin data.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match exactly between certificate and invoice after allowed normalizations. No mismatches or uncertainties found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
